title: Textarea
description: A multi-line input component for capturing longer text content from users, such as comments or messages.
summary: A form input for capturing multi-line text with customizable styling and behavior (support JsonInput).

body.raw:
---

The `Textarea` component provides a flexible and customizable input field that can handle multi-line text entries. It can be styled to fit different layouts and is perfect for situations where users need to enter longer text, such as feedback forms, comments, or code editors.

---

## Usage

The `Textarea` component is designed for handling multi-line text input. It can be used in forms, feedback sections, or anywhere where users need to provide more extensive information. Below is a basic example demonstrating how to use the `Textarea` component effectively in your project.

<TextareaDemosUsage />

## Textarea Validate Json

If your `Textarea` is intended for handling JSON input or any structured data, validation is crucial. This section demonstrates how to use the `Textarea` component along with validation, ensuring that the data entered by the user is in a valid JSON format.

<TextareaDemosValidateJson />

---

**Tip**:

> Use the `resize` property to control whether the user can resize the textarea. It's great for keeping the layout consistent, especially on fixed-width containers.

**Note**:

> Ensure that proper validation is in place when using `Textarea` for sensitive input types, like JSON or code, to provide immediate feedback for users.

---

## API References

- [`mdn`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTML/Element/textarea)

JsonInput is based on Textarea component, it includes json validation logic and option to format input value on blur.

Textarea will adjust its height when you give it a value that exceeds its initial height, this approach will help you more to review what you have typed previously.

### Styles API

| Styles API  | Type      | Default | Annotation                                    |
| ----------- | --------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------- |
| unstyled`?` | `boolean` | `false` | if `true`, all default styles will be removed |

### Props API

| Props API            | Type                             | Default          | Annotation                                                                                                                                |
| -------------------- | -------------------------------- | ---------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| autosize`?`          | `boolean`                        | `true`           | determines whether the textarea height should grow with its content                                                                       |
| serialize`?`         | `typeof JSON.stringify`          | `JSON.stringify` | function to serialize value into a string, used for value formatting                                                                      |
| deserialize`?`       | `typeof JSON.parse`              | `JSON.parse`     | function to deserialize string value, used for value formatting and input JSON validation, must throw error if string cannot be processed |
| validateJson`?`      | `boolean`                        | `false`          | options for JSON validation                                                                                                               |
| formatOnBlur`?`      | `boolean`                        | `false`          | options for formatting JSON when blurring                                                                                                 |
| validationError`?`   | `string`                         | `"Invalid JSON"` | message thrown if JSON invalid                                                                                                            |
| onValidationError`?` | `(error: Error \| null) => void` | `undefined`      | callback when validation fails                                                                                                            |

---

## Source Codes

Full working code example, including necessary markup and styles.
You can copy and paste this code directly to start using the component immediately.

<SourceCodes name="textarea" />

`,(0,r.jsx)(t,{name:"textarea",code:`import React from "react";\r
import { cn } from "@/utils/cn";\r
\r
export interface TextareaProps extends React.TextareaHTMLAttributes<HTMLTextAreaElement> {\r
  autosize?: boolean;\r
  unstyled?: boolean;\r
  serialize?: typeof JSON.stringify;\r
  deserialize?: typeof JSON.parse;\r
  style?: React.CSSProperties & { [key: string]: any };\r
  validateJson?: boolean;\r
  formatOnBlur?: boolean;\r
  validationError?: string;\r
  onValidationError?: (error: Error | null) => void;\r
}\r
\r
export const Textarea = React.forwardRef<HTMLTextAreaElement, TextareaProps>((_props, ref) => {\r
  const { unstyled, className, autosize = true, spellCheck = false, validateJson = false, formatOnBlur = false, deserialize = JSON.parse, serialize = JSON.stringify, validationError = "Invalid JSON", readOnly, onValidationError, onBlur, onChange, onFocus, onInput, ...props } = _props;\r
\r
  const onAutoSIze = (event: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>, safeHeight: number = 2) => {\r
    if (autosize && getEnv() !== "test") {\r
      event.currentTarget.style.height = "auto";\r
      event.currentTarget.style.height = \`\${event.currentTarget.scrollHeight + safeHeight}px\`;\r
    }\r
  };\r
\r
  const handleOnBlur = (event: React.FocusEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {\r
    const value = event.target.value;\r
    if (validateJson) {\r
      if (formatOnBlur && !readOnly && value.trim() === "") {\r
        onValidationError?.(null);\r
        onBlur?.(event);\r
        return;\r
      }\r
      if (!isValidJson(value, deserialize)) {\r
        onValidationError?.(new Error(validationError));\r
        return;\r
      }\r
      if (formatOnBlur) {\r
        try {\r
          const formattedJson = serialize!(deserialize!(value), null, 2); // JSON format with 2-space indentation\r
          event.target.value = formattedJson;\r
          onAutoSIze(event);\r
\r
          onChange?.({\r
            ...event,\r
            target: { ...event.target, value: formattedJson }\r
          });\r
        } catch (error: any) {\r
          console.log("JSON.parse", error);\r
        }\r
      }\r
      onValidationError?.(null);\r
    }\r
    onBlur?.(event);\r
  };\r
\r
  const handleOnInput = (event: React.InputEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => {\r
    if (validateJson && !readOnly) {\r
      onValidationError?.(null);\r
    }\r
    onFocus?.(event as any);\r
    onAutoSIze(event as any);\r
  };\r
\r
  const handleOnFocus = (event: React.FocusEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement, Element>) => {\r
    if (validateJson && event.target.value.trim() !== "") {\r
      if (isValidJson(event.target.value, deserialize)) onValidationError?.(null);\r
    }\r
    onInput?.(event as any);\r
  };\r
\r
  return (\r
    <textarea\r
      {...{\r
        ref,\r
        readOnly,\r
        spellCheck,\r
        onChange,\r
        onBlur: handleOnBlur,\r
        onInput: handleOnInput,\r
        onFocus: handleOnFocus,\r
        className: cn(\r
          !unstyled && [\r
            "relative flex min-h-20 w-full max-w-full resize-y rounded-md border border-border bg-background p-3 py-2 text-sm leading-snug ring-offset-background scrollbar placeholder:text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-[#2f81f7] focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-[15px] [&::-webkit-resizer]:hidden",\r
            { "bg-muted-emphasis font-mono text-sm text-muted-foreground focus-visible:ring-muted md:text-sm": validateJson }\r
          ],\r
          "[field-sizing:content]",\r
          className\r
        ),\r
        ...props\r
      }}\r
    />\r
  );\r
});\r
Textarea.displayName = "Textarea";\r
\r
function getEnv() {\r
  if (typeof process !== "undefined" && process.env && process.env.NODE_ENV) {\r
    return process.env.NODE_ENV;\r
  }\r
  return "development";\r
}\r
\r
export function isValidJson(value: string, deserialize: typeof JSON.parse) {\r
  if (typeof value === "string" && value.trim().length === 0) {\r
    return true;\r
  }\r
  try {\r
    deserialize(value);\r
    return true;\r
  } catch (_e: any) {\r
    return false;\r
  }\r
